creator: fumifumi@abacustech.jp
text:
Hello,

Please commit this patch.

Thanks,

 > Maintainer of www/pivotx,
 > Please note that PR ports/157648 has just been submitted.

 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the
 > patch and a committer will take care of it.

 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157648

 > -- 
 > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
 > edwin@FreeBSD.org
